title: Tangy Crispy German Applesauce Toast
description: A delicious German-inspired brunch dish featuring crispy bread, tangy applesauce, and a hint of cinnamon, perfect for a cozy morning meal. This egg-free friendly recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the applesauce, sugar, cinnamon, and salt.
Butter one side of each bread slice.
Place the bread slices, buttered side up, on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the bread in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the bread is baking, stir the lemon juice into the applesauce mixture.
Once the bread is ready, let it cool for a minute or two before spreading the applesauce mixture evenly onto each slice.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Consider serving with a side of coffee or tea for a complete brunch experience.
